manifest.reason: Control artifacts make Factory, Taskstream, Integration, and Autopilot runs auditable.

patch.reason: Patch bundles are high-value evidence and integration inputs.

validation.reason: Validation evidence is required before fanout and integration decisions can be trusted.

release_packet.reason: Release evidence is the human review packet.

screenshot_raw.reason: Raw screenshots can be bulky and must have verified normalized derivatives before future pruning.

log.reason: Logs should remain searchable through summaries while raw bodies can be compressed later.

sqlite_db.reason: SQLite databases require controlled snapshots and integrity checks.

sqlite_wal.reason: WAL/SHM files must never be archived or deleted independently of active database state.

build_intermediate.reason: Build intermediates are reproducible but v1 only reports candidates.

client_data.reason: Client and business data is high-value and high-sensitivity.

hard_rules: v1 treats the external 8TB vault as a planned target and does not require it to be mounted
active DB/WAL files are never lifecycle-pruned
raw screenshots are never deleted without verified normalized derivatives
catalog metadata should outlive artifact bodies in future lifecycle versions
